name: Hatred Unshackled
effect: For turns equal to your Rank Bonus, or until you drop below 1/4th of your total health, all Rampage Moves gain +3 Damage Dice. You ignore Confusion until this move fades, you cannot use this move while Confused. You lose 3 Health at the end of each turn.
description: Your mind clouds with your hate, your body begins to adapt to the excess hormones. You become hate personified.
